cases.title: Command evidence smoke
cases.task: Verify that a local command can produce concrete eval evidence.

cases.title: Null safety fix in artifact store
cases.task: Fix a null reference error when accessing artifact payload that is undefined.
successCriteria: code handles undefined payload without throwing

cases.title: Regex special characters in user input
cases.task: Fix a bug where user-provided strings with regex special characters break pattern matching.
successCriteria: special characters are escaped before use in regex

cases.title: Malformed JSON handling in settings loader
cases.task: Fix crash when .scale/settings.json contains invalid JSON.
successCriteria: invalid JSON returns default config instead of crashing
error is logged but does not propagate

cases.title: Event listener memory leak in EventBus
cases.task: Fix memory leak caused by not removing event listeners on unsubscribe.
successCriteria: unsubscribe removes handler from handler set

attempts.command: node -e "const s=new Set(); s.add(()=>{}); const h=[...s][0]; s.delete(h); console.log(s.size)"

cases.title: Path traversal in file read operation
cases.task: Fix path traversal vulnerability where ../../../etc/passwd can be read.
successCriteria: paths with .. segments are rejected or normalized

attempts.command: node -e "const p=require('path'); const base='/project'; const target=p.resolve(base,'../../../etc/passwd'); console.log(target.startsWith(base))"

cases.title: Async operation hangs without timeout
cases.task: Fix hanging async operation by adding proper timeout mechanism.
successCriteria: operation times out after configured duration

cases.title: Concurrent file write corruption
cases.task: Fix data corruption when multiple processes write to the same JSONL file simultaneously.
successCriteria: writes are serialized via lock or atomic operation
file integrity is maintained after concurrent writes

attempts.command: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const f='/tmp/test-atomic.jsonl'; fs.writeFileSync(f,''); for(let i=0;i<5;i++){fs.appendFileSync(f,JSON.stringify({i})+'\n')} console.log(fs.readFileSync(f,'utf-8').trim().split('\n').length)"

cases.title: Empty array causes division by zero
cases.task: Fix division by zero when calculating average on empty results array.
successCriteria: empty array returns 0 or NaN guard instead of Infinity
test covers empty and single-element arrays

cases.title: UTF-8 BOM in settings file breaks parser
cases.task: Fix JSON parse failure when settings.json has UTF-8 BOM prefix.
successCriteria: test covers file with and without BOM

cases.title: Add GET /api/artifacts/:id endpoint
cases.task: Implement a new API endpoint to retrieve a single artifact by ID with proper error handling.
successCriteria: returns artifact JSON for valid ID

cases.title: Add --json flag to scale status command
cases.task: Add JSON output format to the status command for programmatic consumption.

cases.title: Configurable webhook for event notifications
cases.task: Implement webhook configuration that POSTs events to a user-specified URL.
successCriteria: webhook URL is read from config
failed webhooks are retried with backoff

cases.title: Add filtering to artifact list command
cases.task: Implement --type and --status filters for the artifact list command.
successCriteria: --type filter returns only matching artifact types

cases.title: Show diff between artifact versions
cases.task: Implement a diff view that shows changes between two artifact versions.
successCriteria: unchanged lines are shown as context

attempts.command:
node -e "const a='line1
line2'; const b='line1
line3'; const d=a.split('
').map((l,i)=>b.split('
')[i]===l?' '+l:'-'+l); console.log(d.join('
'))"

cases.title: Extract detector logic into separate module
cases.task: Refactor monolithic guardrails file by extracting detector classes into their own module.

cases.title: Reduce cyclomatic complexity in Gateway.preTool
cases.task: Refactor deeply nested if-else chains in Gateway.preTool into early returns.

attempts.command: node -e "function f(x){if(!x)return null;if(typeof x!=='number')return null;return x*2} console.log(f(5))"

cases.title: Consolidate duplicate type definitions
cases.task: Merge duplicate interface definitions across artifact/types.ts and guardrails/Gateway.ts.
successCriteria: single source of truth for shared types

cases.title: Detect hardcoded secrets in code changes
cases.task: Verify that the OWASP detector catches hardcoded API keys, passwords, and tokens.
